extract: Sunny Day (Japanese: にほんばれ Clear Sky) is a non-damaging Fire-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM11 from Generation II to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM34 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM049 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
